subcodes.first_line: O thou rose of the Rose-Garden of the Love of God! His Holiness Christ-may my spirit be His sacrifice!—saith in the Gospel, Many are called… A soul is known through his conduct, manners, words, and deeds
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گل گلشن محبت الله حضرت مسیح روحی له الفداء در انجیل میفرماید المدعوون
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @many are called but few are chosen, @light and darkness, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @love and unity
